name: Cheddar-Stuffed Cherry Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 8 oz package cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the cherry tomatoes and remove the stems.
2. Using a sharp knife, carefully cut out the cone-shaped core from the stem end of each tomato.
3. Spoon out the center of each tomato using a small spoon.
4. Place the tomatoes upside down on paper towels to drain.
5. In a bowl, mix together the cream cheese, cheddar cheese, milk, minced garlic, ground cumin, cayenne, salt, and pepper. Mash with a fork until smooth.
6. Fit a pastry bag with a large plain tip.
7. Pipe the mixture into each tomato. Alternatively, use a spoon to fill the tomatoes.
